case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. IRON MOUNTIAN MEDICAL CENTER, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $430.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT IRON MOUNTAIN MEDICAL CENTER, LLC HORNE, CYNTHIA RAYE
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRON MOUNTAIN MEDICAL CENTER, LLC HORNE, CYNTHIA RAYE $20,600.31 PRINCIPAL, $2,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $716.28 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,146.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT IRON MOUNTAIN MEDICAL CENTER, LLC HORNE, CYNTHIA RAYE DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-10-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (2 SEPARATE POS), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED SEP-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IRON MOUNTAIN MEDICAL CENTER, LLC HORNE, CYNTHIA RAYE
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
